question: Can a fixed monthly bottom-3 realized-volatility spot portfolio over 13 mature liquid cryptocurrencies earn positive cost-adjusted returns across development, evaluation and confirmation while reducing drawdown?
rebalance: first UTC daily open monthly using information through prior close
development_gate: data PASS; 90d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-35% and below 0.5x benchmark; 60d/180d base >0; turnover <=30
evaluation_gate: 90d base/stress >0; at least one positive year; max drawdown >-35% and below benchmark; 60d/180d base >0
confirmation_gate: 90d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-30% and below benchmark; 60d/180d base >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0
holdout_release_rule: fetch evaluation only after development pass; fetch confirmation only after evaluation pass; never change rules or gates after release
